characters.appearance: Young Asian woman with long dark hair. She has a fair complexion and soft facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Wears various casual outfits including a grey patterned beanie, a black top, and a fuzzy beige jacket.
characters.demeanor: Relatable, slightly awkward but earnest and encouraging.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: So, what's your update on this? [So, what's your update on this?]
Unknown speaker says: Ma'am, order ready है। [Ma'am, the order is ready.]
Character A says: Can I... uh... get a... table? [Can I... uh... get a... table?]
Character A says: Card payment... available? [Card payment... available?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with relatable, awkward real-world English speaking moments.
- Establishes the core problem: feeling nervous and lacking confidence in everyday situations.
- Sets a vulnerable, authentic tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
POV: जब English बोलने में confidence ना हो...
Day 1
(Office में बात करने में डर लगता है)
Day 5
Cafe में order करना भी मुश्किल लगता है
Day 10
Card payment पूछने में भी घबराहट

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सच बताऊँ? मेरी English उतनी अच्छी नहीं है। [Honestly? My English isn't that good.]
Character A says: और ये accept करने में मुझे बहुत time लगा। [And it took me a lot of time to accept this.]
Character A says: जैसे cycle सीखते वक़्त दो-चार बार गिरना पड़ता है, [Just like you have to fall a few times while learning to ride a bicycle,]
Character A says: तो English बोलते वक़्त mistakes करने से इतना डरना क्यों? [Then why be so afraid of making mistakes while speaking English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Character directly addresses the camera, building trust and relatability.
- Normalises making mistakes while learning, using a practical analogy (riding a bike).
- Shifts the emotional state from embarrassment to acceptance.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सच बताऊँ?
मेरी English उतनी अच्छी नहीं है
और ये accept करने में
मुझे बहुत time लगा
जैसे cycle सीखते वक़्त गिरना पड़ता है
तो English बोलते वक़्त
mistakes करने से इतना डरना क्यों?

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: जब से मैंने Supernova app से practice शुरू की है, [Ever since I started practicing with the Supernova app,]
Character A says: सबसे बड़ा change ये आया है कि अब मैं लोगों के सामने बोलने से घबराती नहीं! [The biggest change is that now I don't get nervous speaking in front of people!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the solution to the previously stated problem.
- Highlights the emotional payoff: gaining confidence and losing the fear of judgment.
- Shows the character in a real-world setting, looking more assured.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
जब से मैंने Supernova app से
practice शुरू की है
सबसे बड़ा change ये आया है कि
अब मैं लोगों के सामने
बोलने से घबराती नहीं!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझ जैसे introverts के लिए, इनका AI tutor best है। [For introverts like me, their AI tutor is the best.]
Character A says: आप real-life situations जैसे interview या cafe में order करने की practice कर सकते हो। [You can practice real-life situations like an interview or ordering at a cafe.]
Character A says: बाहर बात करने से पहले, ये practice के लिए एकदम safe space है। [Before talking outside, this is a completely safe space for practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product feature (AI tutor roleplay).
- Explains the practical benefit: simulating real-world situations in a judgment-free zone.
- Reassures introverted or anxious learners.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मुझ जैसे introverts के लिए
इनका AI tutor best है
Real-life situations जैसे
interview या cafe में order करने की
practice कर सकते हो
बाहर बात करने से पहले
ये एकदम safe space है!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अगर आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना चाहते हो, तो link मेरी profile में है। [If you also want to speak English without fear, the link is in my profile.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova के साथ अपनी journey शुरू करो! [Start your journey with Supernova today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
- Directs users to the profile link to download the app.
- Ends on an uplifting, supportive note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अगर आप भी बिना डरे
English बोलना चाहते हो
तो link मेरी profile में है
आज ही Supernova के साथ
अपनी journey शुरू करो!
